MINI MINUTES: Line 5
Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Cassandra Coat.
Attorney Christina Dabis for the plaintiff.
Defendant Doriell Smith is present.
Attorney Anthony Prince appearing for defendant in full scope.

The Judge, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of January 17, 2017 is vacated. (501)
